transcript.text: This video is what I think about homosexuality.
As a heterosexual male, I say homosexuality is good.
Homosexual couples are less likely to have babies on their own.
They're more likely to adopt, which is a good thing.
We need more people adopting and not having babies of their own
Because there are orphans out there who need families.
And they're also more likely not to have children.
And we need more people not having children
Because we have enough people in the world.
Yes, first world countries are decreasing in population,
But we are increasing in population through immigration.
So we definitely do not have a shortage of humanity.
Now talking about immigration, that's a whole other video.
So I'm not going to talk about that here.
Homosexuals are still being suppressed.
So we should definitely support people who are suppressed.
Those are the homosexuals.
Homosexual marriage is a good thing
Because homosexual relationships are just as genuine as heterosexual relationships.
I have seen lesbian couples walk down the street hand in hand
And it's the same thing as if it was a man and a woman.
Same thing with men.
There are a lot of homosexuals also.
So you do not want to turn your back on a large portion of the population.
According to one homosexual magazine, 69% of the males in San Francisco are gay.
So that's a lot of gay people.
I don't know what the percentage is in America,
But it's high enough to start giving them some respect.
Me, I think I'm a pretty eccentric person
Because I express my views
And I, well, I guess that's why.
Well, I've been told I'm an eccentric person.
So as an eccentric person,
All the different eccentric people like the homosexuals need to band together.
So that's why I'm giving my support to them.
If all of the disenfranchised people,
Like the minorities and the gays and the freaks,
All get together,
They are a force to be reckoned with
Against the control freaks.
So it's a strategical reason also.
Homosexual people are nice and creative and smart.
So I say thumbs up to homosexuality.
